ogTitle: Buxton vs Byadbo Wilderness: Climate Safety

heading: Buxton vs Byadbo Wilderness — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Buxton, New South Wales and Byadbo Wilderness, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Byadbo Wilderness has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Buxton (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Buxton or Byadbo Wilderness safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Buxton has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Byadbo Wilderness scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Buxton scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Byadbo Wilderness scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Buxton or Byadbo Wilderness?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Byadbo Wilderness has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
